documents.title: Nominee Public Financial Disclosure (OGE Form 278e)
documents.summary: Filed January 7, 2025 as nominee for Labor Secretary, after one term in the U.S. House. Lists Rip City Properties LLC and a family trust as outside positions, plus a single Deckers Outdoor Corporation holding ($100K-$250K). Spouse Shawn DeRemer's medical practices (Anesthesia Associates Northwest, Evolve Aesthetics & Wellness, Evolve Aesthetics V, Evolve Health NV Carter) each carry valuations Over $1,000,000.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement (amended)
documents.summary: Original signed January 24, 2025; amended June 10, 2025 to extend the Willamette Valley Vineyards divestiture timeframe from 90 to 100 days (cited need to travel to Oregon to sign documents in person). Commits to divest Deckers Outdoor Corporation and Willamette Valley Vineyards, retain unpaid sole-member position in Rip City Properties LLC, retain trustee role in spouse's revocable trust, and recuse on matters involving spouse's medical practice.

documents.title: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.summary: Filed before the June 19, 2025 deadline (cover letter dated July 3, 2025). Marks Yes on resignations, divestitures, 278-T filing (referencing the June 18, 2025 transaction report), managed accounts, interim recusals, and the personal/imputed-interest recusal. Marks N/A on the former-employer/client recusal. No waivers or 502(d) authorizations claimed.

documents.title: Periodic Transaction Report (278-T) — July 2, 2025
documents.summary: Signed July 2, 2025 with a 20-day extension; data revised July 16, 2025. Discloses 82-plus stock sales all dated April 28, 2025 across a broad equity portfolio — names span AMD, Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, BlackRock, Berkshire Hathaway, Broadcom, Chipotle, Eli Lilly, Exxon Mobil, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Tesla, Thermo Fisher and dozens more. Most lots in the $1,001-$15,000 range; Microsoft, Oracle and NVIDIA in $15,001-$50,000. All flagged No for late notification.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: ProPublica's Trump Team Financial Disclosures index was reachable but its individual-appointee detail pages could not be parsed via WebFetch. Cross-check deferred.
